name: VIPSTARCOIN
_comment_reward: must stay POW: getdifficulty returns a PoW/PoS hybrid object and auto-detection would pick POS, which appends an extra signature byte to serialized blocks and makes every submission invalid
_comment_networkHashFromDiff: PoS/PoW hybrid: the daemon's networkhashps folds in the (far harder) PoS difficulty and reads absurdly high (e.g. 568 TH/s), which breaks pool Luck. Derive the PoW-only network hashrate from the raw PoW difficulty (networkDiff * 2^32 / blockTime) instead.

miningTools.name: ccminer (Official, but may be not work)
